vllm.title: [Kernel] Full Tensor Parallelism for LoRA Layers
vllm.author: FurtherAI
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current multi-LoRA layers run only one of the LoRAs with tensor parallelism. Here, I add layers that are fully sharded, as in, both LoRA layers run with tensor parallelism. This has better performance at higher sequence length, rank, tensor parallel size and so on, with similar performance at sm

vllm.title: [Model] Phi-3 4k sliding window temp. fix
vllm.author: caiom
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The model microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct uses a sliding window of size 2047 (which should result in 2048 tokens of context) but due to the issue #3385 the model loading will break:
File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/dist-packages/vllm/core/block_manager_v1.py", line 223, in __init__ assert sliding_wi

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Abort requests when the connection to /v1/completions is interrupted
vllm.author: chestnut-Q
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When the connection to /v1/completions is interrupted, the corresponding requests are not aborted. An exception handling (for asyncio.CancelledError) is needed in merge_async_iterators to fix this bug.
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELOW AND FILL IN THE DESCRIPTION ABOVE

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `min_tokens` when `eos_token_id` is None
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #4365
Also fix re-use of index variable i within inner loop.

vllm.title: ✨ support local cache for models
vllm.author: prashantgupta24
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Updates how files are pulled from HF Hub to support offline usage with cached files and a fallback in case of networking issues or if HF Hub is down.
(Without this change, you have to pass the explicit path to the model in your local HF cache as the model name.)
Taken bits from #3125
BEFORE SUBMITTI

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix return type of executor execute_model methods
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This was changed recently as part of the speculative decoding work, but these type hints were missed.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Resolved Issues For LinearMethod --> QuantConfig
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For some models, we use get_act_fn, which needs to be passed a QuantConfig
in #4373 we updated to pass QuantConfig instead of LinearMethodBase
but the logic for parsing the LinearMethodBase to extract a QuantConfig for some models was not updated

BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELOW A
